prompt: Create a realistic vertical lifestyle photograph of an adult woman seated at a small round wooden café table beside a large vintage window in a cozy, warmly lit café. The subject is a young East Asian woman with dark messy updo hair, shown from mid-thigh upward, sitting on a wooden chair and holding a clear glass of iced tea or iced coffee near her mouth with one hand. Her face should be intentionally obscured by a flat, centered square censor block in a muted skin-toned brown color, covering the entire facial area from forehead to chin. She wears a mustard-yellow ribbed tank top, a loose pale blue button-up shirt slipping off the shoulders, and cream high-waisted shorts, plus a delicate necklace. On the table in the foreground, include exactly 3 visible still-life elements: 1 glass vase filled with dried beige flowers and small lavender accents, 1 white plate holding a single slice of strawberry shortcake with whipped cream and one whole strawberry on top, and 1 small fork resting on the plate. The café interior should feature dark wood tones, blurred chairs and tables in the background, warm pendant light bokeh, and soft daylight entering from the left window. Use shallow depth of field, natural window light mixed with warm ambient light, realistic skin texture and fabric folds, 50mm portrait lens feel, f/1.8 bokeh, cinematic but natural color grading, high-resolution photorealism, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no visible logo.
